description: Rise of Avalon Hotfix 10.1 (03 December 2020) — Fixes and Crystal League adjustments.

sections.heading: Hotfix 10.1
items: Missing items have been returned to chests at Energy Manipulators; items appear in a new tab for 20v20 matches
Fixed ground collision on bridge to Martlock Expedition Master
20v20 Crystal League matches now reward correct number of Tomes of Insight (previously ~3x higher)
Level 1 time slots for 20v20 Off-Season Crystal League corrected
sections.searchable_text: Hotfix 10.1 Energy Manipulator missing items Martlock bridge collision Crystal League Tomes of Insight time slots corrected
